headline: tonies® and Hasbro Reimagine MONOPOLY®, GUESS WHO?®, and THE GAME OF LIFE® for a new era of screen-free, listening-led gaming for Tonieplay®
summary: tonies SE ("tonies"), the globally leading interactive audio platform for children, and Hasbro, a leading games, IP, and toy company, today announced the launch of three classic Hasbro games, reimagined as immersive, audio-first experiences for the Toniebox 2.

headline: Why Hasbro’s Gina Goetter sees finance and operations as one role
summary: As both CFO and COO, Goetter says the two functions are now inseparable, requiring leaders to set up frameworks to handle dual responsibilities, develop talent and help drive decision-making.

raw.headline: Why Hasbro’s Gina Goetter sees finance and operations as one role
